title: LPO Announces Conditional Commitment to Montana Renewables to Significantly Expand US Sustainable Aviation Fuel Production
content: As part of the Biden-Harris administrationâ€™s Investing in America agenda, the Department of Energyâ€™s (DOE) Loan Programs Office (LPO) announced today a conditional commitment for a loan guarantee of up to $1.44 billion to Montana Renewables, LLC (Montana Renewables, or MRL). The loan guarantee, if finalized, will help finance the expansion of a renewable fuels facility in Great Falls, Montana, that will utilize vegetable oils, fats, and greases to produce sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), renewable diesel (RD), and renewable naphtha (RN).
author: Analysts Account
